🌎 Clean & Geocode Addresses
This will clean up messy addresses like WH 36k SqFT - 25 Weldon Rd - DK into just 25 Weldon Rd, Lake Hopatcong, NJ 07849, then use Google to fetch the correct county and lat/lon for each deal.
⚠️ This runs on 5,600 deals. It takes about 10 minutes and uses your Google Places API quota (~5,600 geocoding requests, well under the monthly free tier). The original addresses are preserved in the address_raw column in case you need to roll back.

⚙ Settings
🟢 Connected to Supabase · Project: kxtuegjptvzqycgyzehj

Your credentials are pre-configured. The CRM connects automatically.

📍 Address Autocomplete (Google Places)

Powers live address lookup as you type. Free up to ~65,000 lookups/mo.
Get your key: console.cloud.google.com → Create credentials → API key → Enable Places API and Maps JavaScript API.

✦ AI Features (Anthropic)

Powers AI rent roll parsing and other smart features. Get your key at console.anthropic.com. Stored locally only.

🏦 Default Loan Terms

Applied automatically to Mortgage 1 when you open a new deal's Financial Analysis (if no loan has been entered yet).

Loan Amount = Offer/Asking Price − Down Payment (auto-calculated per deal)
🌎 Clean & Geocode Addresses

Strips junk prefixes/suffixes from addresses (e.g. WH 36k SqFT - 25 Weldon Rd - DK → 25 Weldon Rd, Lake Hopatcong, NJ) and auto-populates county, lat, lon. Uses your Google Places API key.

Safe to re-run — skips deals that already have coordinates by default.
📋 Pipeline Card Fields

Choose which fields show on each deal card in the Pipeline view. Address is recommended and stays at the top.

Changes apply the next time you open the Pipeline view.
📋 Sync New CRM Fields to Airtable

The CRM needs 2 new fields in your Properties table. Click the button to create them automatically using your stored API key — no manual Airtable work needed.

Fields that will be created (if missing): Deal Tag (Single Select) · Is Archived (Checkbox)
